tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Cooler Than Me
Mike Posner
Capo: 3rd Fret

This is just an amalgamation of what was already up here, into one.
Also the bridge chords seemed wrong?

[Breakdown] (C-Bm-Em) using bass strings
